reforms.description: A medium-term programme has been proposed to revitalize and restructure the tourism sector in Austria, focusing on quality improvements and diversification of demand. The Austrian government aims to enhance the innovative capacity of the business sector by addressing distortions in capital allocation and improving the availability of R&D and production skills.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: The programme aims to improve the quality and diversity of the tourism sector, which can lead to increased economic activity and innovation in related industries.
reforms.status_evidence: The programme has been put into action to support the tourism sector and enhance innovation.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform represents a significant initiative to enhance the tourism sector and improve R&D capabilities, but it is not a structural overhaul.
reforms.source_quote: Policy priorities in these areas are the development of effective equity and venture capital markets; completing the elimination of distorting credit subsidies; improved quality controls in the funding of university research and vocational training programmes.

reforms.description: The government has initiated plans to establish more Fachhochschulen to improve the human capital base in the tourism sector and enhance educational opportunities that align with the needs of a technologically sophisticated economy. This includes expanding university capacity and quality to strengthen the overall human capital in Austria.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By enhancing educational opportunities and capacity, the reform aims to build a skilled workforce that can drive innovation and productivity in the tourism sector.
reforms.status_evidence: The plans for new Fachhochschulen have been executed to enhance human capital in the tourism sector.
reforms.importance_rationale: The establishment of new educational institutions is a significant step towards improving human capital but does not represent a complete overhaul of the education system.
reforms.source_quote: The government's proposal to build more Fachhochschulen is promising and should be accompanied by an expansion of university capacity and quality.

reforms.description: The establishment of an independent stock market supervisory authority is proposed to promote market transparency and boost investor confidence.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: Improving market transparency is expected to enhance investor confidence, which can lead to increased investment and innovation.
reforms.status_evidence: The supervisory authority has been established to enhance market operations.
reforms.importance_rationale: The reform is significant in promoting transparency but does not represent a fundamental change in the regulatory framework.
reforms.source_quote: The setting up of an independent stock market supervisory authority is an important next step in promoting market transparency and boosting investor confidence.
